questions:
Q1: What are the antonyms of "Irritable"?
A. Selfish
B. Calm, patient
C. Unfeeling
Q2: Unscramble the letters to find the correct spelling: "tingSy"
Q3: Fill in the blank: "She is generous with her time."

Q4: What are the antonyms of "Impulsive"?
A. Careful, cautious
B. Calm
C. Cruel

Q5: What are the antonyms of "Stingy"?
A. satisfied
B. Stable
C. Generous, giving

Q6: What is the meaning of "Empathetic"?
A. Frequently changing emotions
B. Can wait calmly
C. Understands others’ feelings
Q7: Unscramble the letters to find the correct spelling: "braieltrI"
Q8: Fill in the blank: "He felt jealous of his friend’s success."

Q9: What is the meaning of "Empathetic"?
A. Unwilling to give
B. Gives freely
C. Understands others’ feelings

Q10: What are the antonyms of "Generous"?
A. Selfish, stingy
B. cautious
C. Cruel
Q11: Unscramble the letters to find the correct spelling: "oulJeas"
Q12: Unscramble the letters to find the correct spelling: "nueGosre"

Q13: What are the synonyms of "Patient"?
A. selfish
B. Calm, tolerant
C. Kind
Q14: Fill in the blank: "He is empathetic toward struggling people."

Q15: What is the meaning of "Impulsive"?
A. Acts without thinking
B. Envious of others
C. Unwilling to give

Q16: What are the synonyms of "Patient"?
A. Calm, tolerant
B. unstable
C. Temperamental

Q17: What is the meaning of "Compassionate"?
A. Acts without thinking
B. Caring about others
C. Frequently changing emotions

Q18: What are the antonyms of "Jealous"?
A. Content, satisfied
B. cold
C. Stable

Q19: What are the synonyms of "Irritable"?
A. Calm
B. Moody, short-tempered
C. spontaneous

Q20: What are the synonyms of "Generous"?
A. Calm
B. Kind, giving
C. Envious
